[[File:327inter.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Interior of a Golan Space Colony 2]]
The '''Golan Space Colony 2''' was the next model after [[Golan Space Colony 1]].
With medical facilities and extended repair bays, this station was considered by many as the closest thing to be a 'home away from home'. Its main feature was a dome housing a spacious [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]].

Its successor was the [[Golan Space Colony 3]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
